label: FACIS SFTP — Parsers
info:
Three parsers, one function node each:

  JSON  — JSON.parse; if array, return as-is (one record per element);
          if object, wrap in single-element list. Mirrors
          sftp_poller.py:87-93. On parse exception → DLQ.

  CSV   — csv-parse/sync (npm) with `columns: true, cast: false,
          skip_empty_lines: true, relax_column_count: false`. cast=false
          keeps all values as strings, matching csv.DictReader. The strict
          column-count is a *tightening* vs Python which silently padded
          missing columns with None — documented in the README.

  Raw   — `[{raw_content: content.toString('utf8')}]`. Matches Python's
          fallback at sftp_poller.py:100-101.

All parsers fan out one `sftp.record` msg per record. Failures route to
`sftp.dlq` with error_type='parse'.

name: JSON parser
CSV parser
raw passthrough
